commands.summary: Show full command help catalog or help for one command path.
Inspect engine capability metadata.
Summarize loaded state (sequences, containers, metadata).
Load a project/state file into the current state.
Save current state to a project file.
Reserved screenshot adapter command (currently disabled by security policy).
Render sequence map SVG.
Render stored dotplot payload as SVG (optional flexibility panel and display tuning).
commands.usage: render-dotplot-svg SEQ_ID DOTPLOT_ID OUTPUT.svg [--flex-track ID] [--display-threshold N] [--intensity-gain N] [--overlay-x-axis percent_length|left_aligned_bp|right_aligned_bp|shared_exon_anchor|query_anchor_bp] [--overlay-anchor-exon START..END]

commands.summary: Inspect TFBS, restriction-site, splicing, isoform, or transcript/protein expert details as JSON.
commands.usage: inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID tfbs FEATURE_ID | inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID restriction CUT_POS_1BASED [--enzyme NAME] [--start START_1BASED] [--end END_1BASED] | inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID splicing FEATURE_ID | inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID isoform PANEL_ID | inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID protein-comparison [--transcript TRANSCRIPT_ID] [--ensembl-entry ENTRY_ID] [--feature-key KEY]... [--feature-key-not KEY]... | inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID uniprot-projection PROJECTION_ID [--feature-key KEY]... [--feature-key-not KEY]...

commands.summary: Render TFBS, restriction-site, splicing, isoform, or transcript/protein expert visualization as SVG.
commands.usage: render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID tfbs FEATURE_ID OUTPUT.svg | render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID restriction CUT_POS_1BASED [--enzyme NAME] [--start START_1BASED] [--end END_1BASED] OUTPUT.svg | render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID splicing FEATURE_ID OUTPUT.svg | render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID isoform PANEL_ID OUTPUT.svg | render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID protein-comparison [--transcript TRANSCRIPT_ID] [--ensembl-entry ENTRY_ID] [--feature-key KEY]... [--feature-key-not KEY]... OUTPUT.svg | render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID uniprot-projection PROJECTION_ID [--feature-key KEY]... [--feature-key-not KEY]... OUTPUT.svg

commands.summary: Import curated isoform-panel JSON for one sequence context.
Inspect imported isoform architecture payload as expert-view JSON.
Render imported isoform architecture as publication-oriented SVG.
Validate curated isoform-panel JSON and return a curator-oriented report.
Render RNA secondary structure SVG.
Inspect textual RNA secondary-structure report.
Render lineage graph SVG.
List built-in protocol-cartoon IDs.
Render built-in protocol cartoon as SVG.
Render protocol cartoon SVG from a template JSON file.
Validate one protocol cartoon template JSON file.
Render protocol cartoon SVG from template + bindings JSON files.
Export canonical built-in protocol template JSON for editing.
Preview one destination-first Gibson plan and emit overlaps, primers, validation findings, and cartoon bindings.
Apply one destination-first Gibson plan and create primer/product sequence outputs.
Inspect prepared reference/helper cache roots and report installs, orphaned remnants, and artifact groups.
Conservatively clear derived cache artifacts or prepared installs within selected reference/helper cache roots.
Render serial gel SVG from sequence ids, containers, or an arrangement with optional explicit ladders.
commands.usage: render-pool-gel-svg IDS|'-' OUTPUT.svg [--ladders NAME[,NAME]] [--containers ID[,ID]] [--arrangement ARR_ID]

commands.summary: Create a reusable serial arrangement over stored lane containers.
Persist one or two ladder names on an existing serial arrangement.
Create one deterministic physical rack draft from a stored arrangement.
commands.usage: racks create-from-arrangement ARR_ID [--rack-id ID] [--name TEXT] [--profile small_tube_4x6|plate_96|plate_384]

commands.summary: Append one arrangement as a contiguous block onto an existing saved rack.
Move one rack sample or one whole arrangement block using shift-neighbor semantics.
Move multiple selected rack samples together within one arrangement block using shared shift-neighbor semantics.
commands.usage: racks move-samples RACK_ID --from A1 [--from A2 ...] --to B1

commands.summary: Move multiple selected arrangement blocks together using the shared shift-neighbor rack semantics.
commands.usage: racks move-blocks RACK_ID --arrangement ARR_ID [--arrangement ARR_ID ...] --to B1

commands.summary: Inspect one saved rack and its occupied coordinates as structured JSON.
Export a deterministic rack or arrangement-scoped label sheet as SVG.
commands.usage: racks labels-svg RACK_ID OUTPUT.svg [--arrangement ARR_ID] [--preset compact_cards|print_a4|wide_cards]

commands.summary: Export one deterministic top-view fabrication/planning SVG for a saved rack.
Export one deterministic pseudo-3D/isometric SVG for a saved rack.
Export one deterministic parameterized OpenSCAD source file for a saved rack.
Export one carrier-matched front-strip/module-label SVG sheet for a saved rack using shared carrier-label presets.
Export one machine-readable physical rack geometry/placement JSON for downstream simulation adapters.
Reflow one saved rack onto another built-in rack or plate profile.
Apply one shared rack-authoring template such as bench rows, plate columns, or plate edge avoidance.
Reflow one saved rack under row-major or column-major fill order.
Reflow one saved rack onto a custom A1-style rows-by-columns geometry.
Persist or clear blocked rack coordinates and reflow occupied positions across the remaining available slots.
Inspect built-in ladder catalogs.
Export ladder definitions as JSON.
Inspect the built-in protease catalog.
Inspect one protease catalog entry by name or alias.
Predict and optionally materialize protease peptide products from a protein sequence.
commands.usage: proteases digest SEQ_ID PROTEASE[,PROTEASE...] [--output-prefix PREFIX] [--min-length-aa N] [--predict-only]

commands.summary: Render a protease peptide digest as a protein-gel SVG for graphical inspection.
commands.usage: proteases digest-gel-svg SEQ_ID PROTEASE[,PROTEASE...] OUTPUT.svg [--min-length-aa N] [--ladder NAME] [--ladders CSV]

commands.summary: Export selected sequence IDs as a pool artifact.
Export deterministic process run bundle JSON for reproducibility/audit.
Import pool artifact members as project sequences.
List configured external/builtin agent systems from catalog.
Send prompt to one agent system and optionally execute suggested shared-shell commands.
commands.usage: agents ask SYSTEM_ID --prompt TEXT [--catalog PATH] [--base-url URL] [--model MODEL] [--timeout-secs N] [--connect-timeout-secs N] [--read-timeout-secs N] [--max-retries N] [--max-response-bytes N] [--allow-auto-exec] [--execute-all] [--execute-index N ...] [--no-state-summary]

commands.summary: List available GUI intent targets and supported query arguments.
Request opening a GUI target (prepared refs, dialogs, assistant views).
commands.usage: ui open TARGET [--genome-id GENOME_ID] [--helpers] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter TEXT] [--species TEXT] [--latest]

commands.summary: Request focusing an already-open GUI target.
commands.usage: ui focus TARGET [--genome-id GENOME_ID] [--helpers] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter TEXT] [--species TEXT] [--latest]

commands.summary: List prepared genomes/helpers for GUI intent disambiguation.
commands.usage: ui prepared-genomes [--helpers] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter TEXT] [--species TEXT] [--latest]

commands.summary: Resolve latest prepared genome/helper candidate by species query.
Fetch one GenBank accession via NCBI EFetch and import it as a sequence.
Resolve one dbSNP rsID and extract an annotated genomic region from a prepared genome.
commands.usage: dbsnp fetch RS_ID GENOME_ID [--flank-bp N] [--output-id ID] [--annotation-scope none|core|full] [--max-annotation-features N] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Derive transcript-TSS-centered promoter windows and write them back as generated promoter features.
commands.usage: variant annotate-promoters SEQ_ID [--gene-label LABEL] [--transcript-id ID] [--upstream-bp N] [--downstream-bp N] [--collapse transcript|gene]

commands.summary: Summarize whether one variant lies in promoter context, including chosen gene/transcript, signed TSS distance, and suggested assay family.
commands.usage: variant promoter-context SEQ_ID [--variant ID] [--gene-label LABEL] [--transcript-id ID] [--promoter-upstream-bp N] [--promoter-downstream-bp N] [--tfbs-focus-half-window-bp N] [--path FILE.json]

commands.summary: Rank deterministic promoter-reporter fragment candidates around one promoter-proximal variant.
commands.usage: variant reporter-fragments SEQ_ID [--variant ID] [--gene-label LABEL] [--transcript-id ID] [--retain-downstream-from-tss-bp N] [--retain-upstream-beyond-variant-bp N] [--max-candidates N] [--path FILE.json]

commands.summary: Create one reference or alternate single-allele sequence from a promoter fragment carrying a single-nucleotide variant.
commands.usage: variant materialize-allele SEQ_ID --allele reference|alternate [--variant ID] [--output-id ID]

commands.summary: Fetch one UniProt SWISS-PROT text entry by accession or ID.
Import one local SWISS-PROT text record into project metadata.
List stored UniProt entries in project metadata.
Show one stored UniProt entry as structured JSON.
Project UniProt feature intervals onto transcript/CDS coordinates in one sequence.
commands.usage: uniprot map ENTRY_ID SEQ_ID [--projection-id ID] [--transcript ID]

commands.summary: List stored UniProt-to-genome projection records.
Show one stored UniProt-to-genome projection record.
Query coding DNA and exon attribution for one mapped UniProt protein feature.
commands.usage: uniprot feature-coding-dna PROJECTION_ID FEATURE_QUERY [--transcript ID] [--mode genomic_as_encoded|translation_speed_optimized|both] [--speed-profile human|mouse|yeast|ecoli]

commands.summary: Resolve normalized UniProt-to-Ensembl transcript/protein links for one stored projection.
Summarize exon/CDS nucleotide accounting and derived peptide length for one stored projection.
Compare projected coding exons against imported Ensembl exon/CDS evidence.
Compare GENtle-derived, UniProt, and optional Ensembl peptide evidence for one stored projection.
Run and persist the integrated UniProt/Ensembl projection audit plus local unsent maintainer-email draft.
commands.usage: uniprot audit-projection PROJECTION_ID [--transcript ID] [--ensembl-entry ID] [--report-id ID]

commands.summary: Compare the direct integrated audit against the same result reconstructed from the public UniProt/Ensembl primitives.
commands.usage: uniprot audit-parity PROJECTION_ID [--transcript ID] [--ensembl-entry ID] [--report-id ID]

commands.summary: List stored UniProt projection audit reports.
Show one stored UniProt projection audit report.
Export one stored UniProt projection audit report to JSON.
List stored UniProt audit parity reports.
Show one stored UniProt audit parity report.
Export one stored UniProt audit parity report to JSON.
Fetch one Ensembl protein/transcript-backed protein entry from Ensembl REST.
List stored Ensembl protein entries in project metadata.
Show one stored Ensembl protein entry as structured JSON.
Import one stored Ensembl protein entry as a first-class protein sequence.
Normalize REBASE source data into project resource JSON.
Normalize JASPAR source data into project motif JSON.
Refresh and persist reusable JASPAR remote metadata for one selected local motif subset.
commands.usage: resources sync-jaspar-remote-metadata [--motif TOKEN ...] [--motifs CSV] [--all] [--filter TOKEN] [--limit N] [--output OUTPUT.json]

commands.summary: Present selected or all local JASPAR entries with max/min motif strings and deterministic random-background score summaries.
commands.usage: resources summarize-jaspar [--motif TOKEN ...] [--motifs CSV] [--all] [--random-length N] [--seed N] [--output OUTPUT.json]

commands.summary: Benchmark the full active local JASPAR registry over one deterministic random background and emit an export-ready drift snapshot.
List local JASPAR entries with consensus/length fields and optional compact remote species metadata summaries for the returned subset.
Inspect one local JASPAR entry with matrix/logo payloads, multiple score distributions, and optional remote species metadata.
commands.usage: resources inspect-jaspar MOTIF [--random-length N] [--seed N] [--fetch-remote] [--output OUTPUT.json]

commands.summary: List/search reference catalog entries.
List Ensembl species directories that currently appear installable.
Resolve one current Ensembl candidate into a real catalog entry and prepare it immediately.
commands.usage: genomes install-ensembl SPECIES_DIR [--collection vertebrates|metazoa] [--catalog PATH] [--output-catalog PATH] [--genome-id ID] [--cache-dir PATH] [--timeout-secs N]

commands.summary: Validate reference genome catalog entries.
Preview Ensembl URL/spec refreshes for genome catalog rows with template metadata without writing changes.
Refresh explicit pinned Ensembl URLs/specs for catalog rows with template metadata.
Inspect local availability and prep status for one genome.
List indexed genes from one reference genome.
commands.usage: genomes genes GENOME_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter REGEX] [--biotype NAME] [--limit N] [--offset N]

commands.summary: Prepare/index one reference genome locally.
commands.usage: genomes prepare GENOME_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--timeout-secs N]

commands.summary: Delete one prepared genome install from cache without editing the catalog JSON.
Delete one genome row from a writable catalog JSON without touching prepared cache files.
Run BLAST query against one reference genome (quick flags plus optional JSON override object).
commands.usage: genomes blast GENOME_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Start one async BLAST query against a prepared reference genome cache.
commands.usage: genomes blast-start GENOME_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Inspect async reference-genome BLAST job status and optional final report.
Request cooperative cancellation for one async reference-genome BLAST job.
List known async reference-genome BLAST jobs in the current process.
BLAST query and import hits as features on target sequence (supports optional JSON override object).
commands.usage: genomes blast-track GENOME_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE TARGET_SEQ_ID [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--track-name NAME] [--clear-existing] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extract genomic interval into a project sequence (default annotation_scope=core).
commands.usage: genomes extract-region GENOME_ID CHR START END [--output-id ID] [--annotation-scope none|core|full] [--max-annotation-features N] [--include-genomic-annotation|--no-include-genomic-annotation] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extract a named gene interval into a project sequence.
commands.usage: genomes extract-gene GENOME_ID QUERY [--occurrence N] [--output-id ID] [--extract-mode gene|coding_with_promoter] [--promoter-upstream-bp N] [--annotation-scope none|core|full] [--max-annotation-features N] [--include-genomic-annotation|--no-include-genomic-annotation] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extend anchored genomic sequence by 5' or 3'.
commands.usage: genomes extend-anchor SEQ_ID 5p|3p LENGTH_BP [--output-id ID] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--prepared-genome GENOME_ID]

commands.summary: Re-check one anchored sequence against its prepared genome coordinates.
commands.usage: genomes verify-anchor SEQ_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--prepared-genome GENOME_ID]

commands.summary: List/search helper catalog entries.
List current Ensembl candidates under the helper-family command tree.
Resolve one current Ensembl candidate into a helper catalog entry and prepare it immediately.
commands.usage: helpers install-ensembl SPECIES_DIR [--collection vertebrates|metazoa] [--catalog PATH] [--output-catalog PATH] [--genome-id ID] [--cache-dir PATH] [--timeout-secs N]

commands.summary: List/search structured host-profile catalog entries.
Validate helper genome catalog entries.
Preview Ensembl URL/spec refreshes for helper catalog rows with template metadata without writing changes.
Refresh explicit pinned Ensembl URLs/specs for helper catalog rows with template metadata.
Inspect local availability and prep status for one helper genome.
List indexed genes from one helper genome.
commands.usage: helpers genes HELPER_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter REGEX] [--biotype NAME] [--limit N] [--offset N]

commands.summary: Prepare/index one helper genome locally.
commands.usage: helpers prepare HELPER_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--timeout-secs N]

commands.summary: Delete one prepared helper install from cache without editing the catalog JSON.
Delete one helper row from a writable catalog JSON without touching prepared cache files.
Run BLAST query against one helper genome (quick flags plus optional JSON override object).
commands.usage: helpers blast HELPER_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Start one async BLAST query against a prepared helper genome cache.
commands.usage: helpers blast-start HELPER_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Inspect async helper-genome BLAST job status and optional final report.
Request cooperative cancellation for one async helper-genome BLAST job.
List known async helper-genome BLAST jobs in the current process.
BLAST query and import hits as features on target sequence (supports optional JSON override object).
commands.usage: helpers blast-track HELPER_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE TARGET_SEQ_ID [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--track-name NAME] [--clear-existing] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extract helper-genome interval into a project sequence (default annotation_scope=core).
commands.usage: helpers extract-region HELPER_ID CHR START END [--output-id ID] [--annotation-scope none|core|full] [--max-annotation-features N] [--include-genomic-annotation|--no-include-genomic-annotation] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extract helper-gene interval into a project sequence.
commands.usage: helpers extract-gene HELPER_ID QUERY [--occurrence N] [--output-id ID] [--extract-mode gene|coding_with_promoter] [--promoter-upstream-bp N] [--annotation-scope none|core|full] [--max-annotation-features N] [--include-genomic-annotation|--no-include-genomic-annotation] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extend anchored helper sequence by 5' or 3'.
commands.usage: helpers extend-anchor SEQ_ID 5p|3p LENGTH_BP [--output-id ID] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--prepared-genome GENOME_ID]

commands.summary: Re-check one anchored sequence against its prepared helper coordinates.
commands.usage: helpers verify-anchor SEQ_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--prepared-genome GENOME_ID]

commands.summary: List CUT&RUN datasets from the shared catalog family.
Inspect prepared/local status for one CUT&RUN dataset.
Materialize one CUT&RUN dataset's processed assets into the prepared cache.
Project one prepared CUT&RUN dataset onto a genome-anchored sequence.
commands.usage: cutrun project SEQ_ID DATASET_ID [--no-peaks] [--no-signal] [--clear-existing] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Interpret CUT&RUN FASTA/FASTQ reads or prepared dataset-backed raw reads against one anchored ROI and save a read report.
commands.usage: cutrun interpret SEQ_ID INPUT_R1 [INPUT_R2] [--dataset DATASET_ID] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--format fasta|fastq] [--layout single_end|paired_end] [--flank-bp N] [--report-id ID] [--checkpoint-path PATH] [--checkpoint-every-reads N] [--seed-kmer-len N] [--min-seed-matches N] [--max-mismatches N] [--min-identity F] [--max-fragment-span-bp N] [--deduplicate-fragments|--no-deduplicate-fragments]

commands.summary: List saved CUT&RUN ROI read reports, optionally filtered to one anchored sequence.
Inspect one saved CUT&RUN ROI read report in full JSON form.
Export per-base coverage, cut-site counts, or fragment spans from one saved CUT&RUN read report.
Aggregate CUT&RUN ROI evidence into support windows, confirmed/unconfirmed TFBS rows, and motif-context summaries.
commands.usage: cutrun inspect-regulatory-support SEQ_ID [--dataset DATASET_ID]... [--read-report REPORT_ID]... [--promoter-search-start N] [--promoter-search-end N] [--neighbor-window-bp N] [--species-filter NAME]... [--path OUTPUT.json]

commands.summary: Import BED features aligned to an anchored sequence.
commands.usage: tracks import-bed SEQ_ID PATH [--name NAME] [--min-score N] [--max-score N] [--clear-existing]

commands.summary: Import BigWig signal track aligned to an anchored sequence.
commands.usage: tracks import-bigwig SEQ_ID PATH [--name NAME] [--min-score N] [--max-score N] [--clear-existing]

commands.summary: Import VCF variants aligned to an anchored sequence.
commands.usage: tracks import-vcf SEQ_ID PATH [--name NAME] [--min-score N] [--max-score N] [--clear-existing]

commands.summary: List tracked genome-track subscriptions.
Add tracked genome-track subscription.
commands.usage: tracks tracked add PATH [--source auto|bed|bigwig|vcf] [--name NAME] [--min-score N] [--max-score N] [--clear-existing]

commands.summary: Remove one tracked genome-track subscription.
Remove all tracked genome-track subscriptions.
Apply tracked genome-track subscriptions to anchored sequences.
List persisted guide sets.
Page guides from one set.
Create or replace one guide set from JSON input.
Delete one guide set.
Apply practical design-constraint filtering to one guide set.
commands.usage: guides filter GUIDE_SET_ID [--config JSON|@FILE] [--config-file PATH] [--output-set GUIDE_SET_ID]

commands.summary: Inspect persisted practical-filter report for one guide set.
Generate guide oligo set from one guide set and template.
List generated guide oligo sets.
Inspect one generated guide oligo set.
Export generated guide oligos to csv/plate/fasta formats.
commands.usage: guides oligos-export GUIDE_SET_ID OUTPUT_PATH [--format csv_table|plate_csv|fasta] [--plate 96|384] [--oligo-set ID]

commands.summary: Export a human-readable guide oligo protocol text file.
Generate and persist a ranked primer-pair report from a DesignPrimerPairs operation payload.
Generate and persist a ranked qPCR assay report from a DesignQpcrAssays operation payload.
Create a restriction-site cloning handoff from one persisted primer-pair report and a destination vector.
Build a validated restriction-cloning handoff request from a saved primer report and destination vector.
commands.usage: primers seed-restriction-cloning-handoff PRIMER_REPORT_ID VECTOR_SEQ_ID [--pair-rank N] [--mode single_site|directed_pair] [--forward-enzyme NAME] [--reverse-enzyme NAME] [--forward-leader SEQ] [--reverse-leader SEQ]

commands.summary: Inspect MCS-first and unique-cutter restriction-enzyme suggestions for one destination vector.
List persisted restriction-cloning PCR handoff reports.
Inspect one persisted restriction-cloning PCR handoff report by report ID.
Write one persisted restriction-cloning PCR handoff report to JSON.
Probe Primer3 backend reachability/version for the selected backend/executable settings.
Resolve one feature ROI and emit seeded DesignPrimerPairs/DesignQpcrAssays operation payloads.
Resolve one splicing-group ROI and emit seeded DesignPrimerPairs/DesignQpcrAssays operation payloads.
List persisted primer-design reports.
Inspect one persisted primer-design report by report ID.
Write one persisted primer-design report to JSON.
List persisted qPCR assay design reports.
Inspect one persisted qPCR assay report by report ID.
Write one persisted qPCR assay report to JSON.
Group TFBS hits by factor name within one focus window and compare them against a wider context window.
commands.usage: features tfbs-summary SEQ_ID --focus START..END [--context START..END] [--min-focus-count N] [--min-context-count N] [--limit N]

commands.summary: Render one stacked SVG plot of continuous TFBS/PSSM score tracks over a selected sequence span.
commands.usage: features tfbs-score-tracks-svg (SEQ_ID OUTPUT.svg|--sequence-text DNA --output OUTPUT.svg) --motif TOKEN [--motif TOKEN ...] [--motifs CSV] [--range START..END|--start N --end N] [--topology linear|circular] [--id-hint TEXT] [--score-kind llr_bits|llr_quantile|true_log_odds_bits|true_log_odds_quantile] [--allow-negative]

commands.summary: Compute and persist one dotplot payload for a query sequence span, optionally against a reference sequence span.
commands.usage: dotplot compute SEQ_ID [--reference-seq REF_SEQ_ID] [--start N] [--end N] [--ref-start N] [--ref-end N] [--mode self_forward|self_reverse_complement|pair_forward|pair_reverse_complement] [--word-size N] [--step N] [--max-mismatches N] [--tile-bp N] [--id DOTPLOT_ID]

commands.summary: Compute and persist one shared-reference multi-query dotplot overlay payload from repeated JSON query specs.
commands.usage: dotplot overlay-compute OWNER_SEQ_ID [--reference-seq REF_SEQ_ID] --query-spec JSON_OR_@FILE [--query-spec JSON_OR_@FILE ...] [--ref-start N] [--ref-end N] [--word-size N] [--step N] [--max-mismatches N] [--tile-bp N] [--id DOTPLOT_ID]

commands.summary: List persisted dotplot payload summaries.
Inspect one persisted dotplot payload by ID.
Derive transcript/cDNA sequences from mRNA or transcript features, optionally constrained by splicing scope.
Compute and persist one promoter-flexibility track for a sequence span.
commands.usage: flex compute SEQ_ID [--start N] [--end N] [--model at_richness|at_skew] [--bin-bp N] [--smoothing-bp N] [--id TRACK_ID]

commands.summary: List persisted flexibility track summaries.
Inspect one persisted flexibility track payload by ID.
Derive DNA-window, mRNA-isoform, and exon-reference sequences from one span.
commands.usage: splicing-refs derive SEQ_ID START_0BASED END_0BASED [--seed-feature-id N] [--scope all_overlapping_any_strand|target_group_any_strand|all_overlapping_target_strand|target_group_target_strand] [--output-prefix PREFIX]

commands.summary: Compute one deterministic pairwise local/global sequence alignment report.
commands.usage: align compute QUERY_SEQ_ID TARGET_SEQ_ID [--query-start N] [--query-end N] [--target-start N] [--target-end N] [--mode global|local] [--match N] [--mismatch N] [--gap-open N] [--gap-extend N]

commands.summary: Import one ABI/AB1 or SCF trace into the shared sequencing-trace evidence store.
List imported sequencing traces, optionally filtered by associated sequence id.
Inspect one persisted sequencing-trace evidence record by id.
Run called-read and/or trace-aware construct confirmation against the expected sequence, optionally with baseline context for intended-edit classification.
commands.usage: seq-confirm run EXPECTED_SEQ_ID [--baseline BASELINE_SEQ_ID] [--reads ID[,ID...]] [--trace-id ID]... [--trace-ids ID[,ID...]] [--junction LEFT_END_0BASED]... [--junction-flank N] [--mode global|local] [--match N] [--mismatch N] [--gap-open N] [--gap-extend N] [--min-identity F] [--min-target-coverage F] [--allow-reverse-complement|--no-reverse-complement] [--report-id ID]

commands.summary: List persisted sequencing-confirmation reports, optionally filtered by expected sequence id.
Inspect one persisted sequencing-confirmation report, including baseline context and per-variant rows when present.
Export one sequencing-confirmation report as pretty-printed JSON.
Export one TSV row per sequencing-confirmation checkpoint target.

Suggest sequencing-primer overlay spans on the expected construct, annotate saved-report coverage, rank the best existing primer hit for each unresolved locus, and propose fresh primers when no good hit exists.
commands.usage: seq-primer suggest EXPECTED_SEQ_ID [--primers ID[,ID...]] [--confirmation-report REPORT_ID] [--min-3prime-anneal-bp N] [--predicted-read-length-bp N]

commands.summary: Reverse-translate one protein sequence into a synthetic coding-DNA product with optional codon-speed and annealing-Tm steering.
commands.usage: reverse-translate run PROTEIN_SEQ_ID [--output-id ID] [--speed-profile human|mouse|yeast|ecoli] [--speed-mark fast|slow] [--translation-table N] [--target-anneal-tm-c F] [--anneal-window-bp N]

commands.summary: List persisted reverse-translation reports, optionally filtered by source protein sequence id.
Inspect one persisted reverse-translation report, including codon-choice diagnostics and resolved translation-table metadata.
Export one reverse-translation report as pretty-printed JSON.
Interpret RNA reads (Nanopore cDNA phase-1 profile) against splicing-derived transcript templates.
commands.usage: rna-reads interpret SEQ_ID FEATURE_ID INPUT.fa[.gz] [--report-id ID] [--report-mode full|seed_passed_only] [--checkpoint-path PATH] [--checkpoint-every-reads N] [--resume-from-checkpoint|--no-resume-from-checkpoint] [--profile nanopore_cdna_v1] [--format fasta] [--scope all_overlapping_any_strand|target_group_any_strand|all_overlapping_target_strand|target_group_target_strand] [--origin-mode single_gene|multi_gene_sparse] [--target-gene GENE_ID]... [--roi-seed-capture|--no-roi-seed-capture] [--kmer-len N] [--short-max-bp N] [--long-window-bp N] [--long-window-count N] [--min-seed-hit-fraction F] [--min-weighted-seed-hit-fraction F] [--min-unique-matched-kmers N] [--min-chain-consistency-fraction F] [--max-median-transcript-gap F] [--min-confirmed-transitions N] [--min-transition-support-fraction F] [--cdna-poly-t-flip|--no-cdna-poly-t-flip] [--poly-t-prefix-min-bp N] [--align-band-bp N] [--align-min-identity F] [--max-secondary-mappings N]

commands.summary: Run retained-hit alignment phase and refresh report mappings/support summaries.
commands.usage: rna-reads align-report REPORT_ID [--selection all|seed_passed|aligned] [--align-band-bp N] [--align-min-identity F] [--max-secondary-mappings N]

commands.summary: List persisted RNA-read interpretation reports.
Inspect one persisted RNA-read interpretation report by ID.
Summarize aligned RNA-read support for one or more target genes from a saved report.
commands.usage: rna-reads summarize-gene-support REPORT_ID --gene GENE_ID [--gene GENE_ID ...] [--record-indices i,j,k] [--complete-rule near|strict|exact] [--output PATH]

commands.summary: Inspect the exact accepted and rejected target-gene RNA-read cohorts from a saved report.
commands.usage: rna-reads inspect-gene-support REPORT_ID --gene GENE_ID [--gene GENE_ID ...] [--record-indices i,j,k] [--complete-rule near|strict|exact] [--cohort all|accepted|fragment|complete|rejected] [--output PATH]

commands.summary: Inspect ranked aligned hits from one RNA-read report.
commands.usage: rna-reads inspect-alignments REPORT_ID [--selection all|seed_passed|aligned] [--limit N] [--effect-filter all_aligned|confirmed_only|disagreement_only|reassigned_only|no_phase1_only|selected_only] [--sort rank|identity|coverage|score] [--search TEXT] [--record-indices i,j,k]

commands.summary: Write one persisted RNA-read interpretation report to JSON.
Export selected interpreted RNA-read hit sequences to FASTA.
Export RNA-read report cohort summaries to TSV sample sheet.
commands.usage: rna-reads export-sample-sheet OUTPUT.tsv [--seq-id ID] [--report-id ID]... [--gene GENE_ID]... [--complete-rule near|strict|exact] [--append]

commands.summary: Export per-read exon-path rows from one RNA-read report.
Export exon/junction abundance tables from one RNA-read report.
Export RNA-read seed-hit score-density chart to SVG.
Export ranked RNA-read alignment rows to TSV.
commands.usage: rna-reads export-alignments-tsv REPORT_ID OUTPUT.tsv [--selection all|seed_passed|aligned] [--limit N]

commands.summary: Export dotplot-style alignment scatter (coverage vs identity) to SVG.
commands.usage: rna-reads export-alignment-dotplot-svg REPORT_ID OUTPUT.svg [--selection all|seed_passed|aligned] [--max-points N]

commands.summary: List persisted candidate sets.
Delete one candidate set.
Generate a candidate window set over one sequence.
commands.usage: candidates generate SET_NAME SEQ_ID --length N [--step N] [--feature-kind KIND] [--feature-label-regex REGEX] [--max-distance N] [--feature-geometry feature_span|feature_parts|feature_boundaries] [--feature-boundary any|five_prime|three_prime|start|end] [--strand-relation any|same|opposite] [--limit N]

commands.summary: Generate candidate windows constrained to the interval between two local sequence anchors.
commands.usage: candidates generate-between-anchors SET_NAME SEQ_ID --length N (--anchor-a-pos N | --anchor-a-json JSON) (--anchor-b-pos N | --anchor-b-json JSON) [--step N] [--limit N]

commands.summary: Page candidate rows from one set.
List available metric names for one set.
Compute derived metric expression for a candidate set.
Compute nearest-feature distance metric for candidate set.
commands.usage: candidates score-distance SET_NAME METRIC_NAME [--feature-kind KIND] [--feature-label-regex REGEX] [--feature-geometry feature_span|feature_parts|feature_boundaries] [--feature-boundary any|five_prime|three_prime|start|end] [--strand-relation any|same|opposite]

commands.summary: Compute weighted objective metric for candidate set.
Select top-k candidates by metric with deterministic tie-break.
commands.usage: candidates top-k INPUT_SET OUTPUT_SET --metric METRIC_NAME --k N [--direction max|min] [--tie-break seq_start_end|seq_end_start|length_ascending|length_descending|sequence_lexicographic]

commands.summary: Compute multi-objective Pareto frontier candidate set.
commands.usage: candidates pareto INPUT_SET OUTPUT_SET --objective METRIC[:max|min] [--objective ...] [--max-candidates N] [--tie-break seq_start_end|seq_end_start|length_ascending|length_descending|sequence_lexicographic]

commands.summary: Filter candidate set by metric bounds/quantiles.
commands.usage: candidates filter INPUT_SET OUTPUT_SET --metric METRIC_NAME [--min N] [--max N] [--min-quantile Q] [--max-quantile Q]

commands.summary: Apply set algebra on candidate sets.
commands.usage: candidates set-op union|intersect|subtract LEFT_SET RIGHT_SET OUTPUT_SET

commands.summary: Execute multi-statement workflow script.
List recorded macro-instance lineage rows.
Show one recorded macro-instance lineage row.
List persisted workflow macro templates.
Show one persisted workflow macro template.
Create or update a persisted workflow macro template.
commands.usage: macros template-put TEMPLATE_NAME (--script SCRIPT_OR_@FILE|--file PATH) [--description TEXT] [--details-url URL] [--param NAME|NAME=DEFAULT ...] [--input-port PORT_ID:KIND[:one|many][:required|optional][:description]] [--output-port PORT_ID:KIND[:one|many][:required|optional][:description]]

commands.summary: Delete one persisted workflow macro template.
Import workflow macro templates from a pattern file or directory tree.
Run or validate one persisted workflow macro template with typed preflight and macro-instance lineage recording.
List cloning routines from the typed routine catalog with optional filters.
commands.usage: routines list [--catalog PATH] [--family NAME] [--status NAME] [--tag TAG] [--query TEXT]

commands.summary: Return a structured explanation for one cloning routine, including requirements, failure modes, and likely confusing alternatives.
Compare two cloning routines with deterministic difference axes and shared/unique vocabulary tags.
Show one planning profile scope or merged effective profile.
Set one planning profile scope from JSON.
Clear one planning profile scope.
Show current planning objective weights and guardrails.
Set planning objective from JSON.
Clear planning objective and restore engine defaults.
List planning sync suggestions with optional status filter.
Accept one pending planning suggestion and apply its patches.
Reject one pending planning suggestion.
Show planning sync status metadata.
Register inbound advisory planning patch as pending suggestion.
commands.usage: planning sync pull JSON_OR_@FILE [--source ID] [--confidence N] [--snapshot-id ID]

commands.summary: Register outbound advisory planning patch as pending suggestion.
commands.usage: planning sync push JSON_OR_@FILE [--source ID] [--confidence N] [--snapshot-id ID]

commands.summary: Execute multi-statement candidate workflow script.
List persisted candidate macro templates.
Show one persisted candidate macro template.
Create or update a persisted candidate macro template.
commands.usage: candidates template-put TEMPLATE_NAME (--script SCRIPT_OR_@FILE|--file PATH) [--description TEXT] [--details-url URL] [--param NAME|NAME=DEFAULT ...]

commands.summary: Delete one persisted candidate macro template.
Run one persisted candidate macro template with bindings.
Set engine/UI parameter via JSON value.
Apply one engine operation payload.
Apply one engine workflow payload.
Apply one engine operation to a state.
Apply a workflow (array of operations) to a state.
Ask one configured agent system and optionally execute suggested commands.
Run BLAST against helper genome index.
Run BLAST against prepared reference genome index.
Return engine capability metadata.
Apply Digest operation using comma-separated enzyme names.
Export DNA ladder definitions as JSON.
Export RNA ladder definitions as JSON.
Apply ExtendGenomeAnchor operation.
Apply ExtractGenomeGene operation.
Apply ExtractGenomeRegion operation.
Apply ImportGenomeBedTrack operation.
Apply ImportGenomeBigWigTrack operation.
Apply ImportGenomeVcfTrack operation.

List structured host-profile catalog entries, optionally filtered.
List current Ensembl candidates where both FASTA and GTF listings are present.

Load DNA/GenBank/FASTA file into a DNAsequence object.
Load a GENtle project JSON into a project state object.
Apply PrepareGenome operation.
Apply RenderPoolGelSvg operation.
Save a project state object to a GENtle project JSON file.

Convenience helper to set VCF display criteria via SetParameter operations.

Normalize JASPAR motif data into GENtle motif JSON.
Normalize REBASE source data into GENtle enzyme JSON.
Write a DNAsequence object to GenBank format.

description: Structured shell/CLI command glossary for GENtle interfaces.
